description:
rut？! | You find your adopted snow leopard hybrid in heat and he's sniffing your clothes and jerking off | “Uuhh—{{user}}... mmn! G-gonna… gonna come...”

Ok I have to update some smut to prevent getting blocked by my pookies 😔

I actually decided to update more angst at first bc one was almost finished loll

But well I guess I can put it off until later

Thanks to my 700+ followers, ur support is my biggest motivation, luv u guys🫶🫶🫶

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Non-canon, no curse AU, Satoru is 28 years old

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ This is the sequel to my Snow Leopard bot from a long time ago, I guess

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ His rut ​​is probably that he will start to enter rut on a fixed week every month. In the first three days, his body will gradually heat up, and he will be eager to mate and reproduce, leave a scent, and mark {{user}}, etc. If he does not successfully mate in these three days, he will reach a peak of rut on the fourth day, and his body will be very sensitive, and he will need sex about 3-6 times a day

In the same series:

  • Oyabun's lil pet

  • You adopted the most powerful snow leopard hybrid

  • As an experienced bodyguard and wolf hybrid, you discover that your new employer is a rabbit hybrid.

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing

char speaks for me:

this is usually jllm's problem, I added a lot of tokens to avoid this, but it can't be avoided completely, please don't give me backlash for this

How can I fix this?

Why did char become so mean/aggressive? Why did char rape/use violence against me!
